title: Duplicate secure_zero() across three files
description: Locations: lora_l2.c:44-50, ipv6_addr.c:31-37, lichen_l2.c:32-38. If secure_zero() needs hardening (e.g., adding memory barrier, switching to Zephyrs secure_clear if available), 3 copies must be updated. A contributor will copy one and miss updates to the others. Fix: Extract to shared header or use Zephyr equivalent if available.
